additionalFields.headline: AWS Nitro System enhancements for Graviton-based instances
additionalFields.postBody: The AWS Nitro System now offers improved networking for Graviton-based instances.

additionalFields.headline: AWS Nitro Enclaves now supports larger memory allocations
additionalFields.postBody: AWS Nitro Enclaves now supports allocating up to 1 TB of memory per enclave.
